author: Benkirane R
title: The Alchemy of Revolution: The Role of Social Networks and New Media in the Arab Spring
argument_summary: The article uses the hashtag #sidibouzid as an empirical dataset to demonstrate how the Tunisian revolution was articulated across multiple linguistic spheres on Twitter. The hashtag functions as a connective device linking different audiences and enabling the synchronization of local events with global visibility.
relevant_quote: the top Twitter users alimenting the hashtag #sidibouzid were the spheres’ vital connectors who used multilingual communication in order to reach different audiences...
